claim: This source kit is not an authorization boundary, analytics platform, notification service, backend, Stable release, or distribution-parity claim.

semantics.nativeBasis: Header, navigation, aside, main, breadcrumb, figure with data-table fallback, and native table semantics composed from public Mergora items.
semantics.rolePolicy: Loading and offline states are persistent status content; failures use alerts; role filtering never replaces backend authorization.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through skip link, navbar, sidebar, chart controls, table controls, and optional notification actions in document order.
Closes the responsive public Navbar or Sidebar surface and returns focus according to those component contracts.
Remain available for dense activity data and the chart data fallback.

nonColor: Current routes, roles, notification read state, chart selection, activity status, loading, offline, and error states use text and native state in addition to green or violet signals.
responsive: The two-region shell becomes a single column at narrow widths; public navigation supplies a mobile path, logical properties support RTL, and touch targets expand under coarse input.
consumerResponsibilities: Authorize every route and data operation on the backend; role-based hiding is presentation only.
Supply secured, abort-aware data and notification adapters with privacy, retention, localization, logging, and failure policy.
Validate chart meaning, real dense data, responsive routes, assistive technology, touch, zoom, and high-contrast behavior in the complete product.
